name: Empowering Tome

abilities.name: Charred Soul
abilities.text: This model may treat Inferno markers as hazardous (Shielded) instead of any other hazardous effects.

actions.name: Cinder's Grasp
actions.effects: Make an Inferno marker within range. Enemies within (Y)3" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be moved 3" toward it.

triggers.name: Burn Over
triggers.text: Enemy models with a friendly Burning token within (Y)3" of the made marker are dealt 2 damage.

extraction_notes: Cinder's Grasp has a filled diamond symbol indicating it's a Signature Action
Burn Over trigger has no suit listed, indicated by empty string for suit field
Burn Over is marked as 'Once per activation' in timing
